title: Takaichi Wins Historic Mandate: The Prospect of Japan Becoming Normal
description: Sanae Takaichi, who became Japan’s first female Prime Minister in October 2025, in the recent snap general elections has led the ruling Liberal Democratic Party (LDP) to its most decisive electoral victory. Winning 316 seats and securing a two-thirds majority […] The post Takaichi Wins Historic Mandate: The Prospect of Japan Becoming Normal appeared first on Centre for Public Policy Research (CPPR).
